pr_title: Remove max_length=7 hard constraint on levers schema
pr_description: Remove `max_length=7` from the `DocumentDetails.levers` Pydantic field When a model returns 8 levers, the hard cap causes a `ValidationError` → `LLMChatError`, discarding all levers from that call — including valid ones (observed in run 87: haiku, gta_game) The downstream `DeduplicateLeversTask` already handles extras, so the schema-level cap is unnecessary and harmful `min_length=5` stays to catch under-generation; the system prompt still guides "5 to 7 levers"
